org.name: Primetime Softball Organization
org.missionStatement: To develop competitive, well-rounded softball players through disciplined coaching, meaningful playing time, and a supportive team-first culture, while preparing athletes for the next level of the game.

teams.name: Primetime 10U
teams.description: Our foundational travel squad — building fundamentals, game IQ, and a love for the sport in a competitive, supportive environment.

teams.name: Primetime 12U
teams.description: Our core competitive squad, sharpening skills and tournament experience as players grow into the next level of travel softball.

teams.name: Primetime Elite 12U
teams.description: Our top competitive 12U squad — built for showcase events, elite tournament fields, and college-exposure-caliber play.

fundraising.intro: Every dollar raised lowers what families pay, funds tournament travel, and helps build a program where athletes can compete, grow, and represent Primetime.

docs.name: Registration Form
docs.description: Season registration for all Primetime teams.

docs.name: Liability Waiver
docs.description: Required waiver for all rostered players.

policies.playerConduct: Sportsmanship, effort, attendance, and respect for coaches, teammates, and opponents.
policies.parentConduct: Sideline conduct, communication channels with coaches, and respectful engagement with officials.
policies.attendance: Practice/game attendance expectations and excused absence policy.
policies.playingTime: Organization philosophy on playing time by age group/division.
policies.grievance: How concerns are raised to a coach or the board, and expected response time.

bylaws.name: Article I — Name & Purpose
bylaws.purpose: Primetime Softball Organization exists to provide competitive travel fastpitch softball opportunities for youth athletes across its member teams.
bylaws.membership: Membership is open to players and families rostered on a Primetime team in good standing with organization policies and fee obligations.
bylaws.governance: The board consists of the President, Vice President, Treasurer, Secretary, and team representatives as outlined on the Board page.
bylaws.meetings: The board meets regularly during the season; meeting schedules and minutes are available to members upon request.
bylaws.amendments: These bylaws may be amended by majority board vote at a scheduled meeting.

finances.seasonFees: Placeholder — list per-team season dues, what they cover (uniforms, tournament fees, facility rental), and payment plan options.
finances.whereFundsGo: Placeholder — travel fund, equipment, tournament entry fees, scholarships for families in need.
finances.budgetSummary: Placeholder — link or embed an annual budget summary reviewed by the board and treasurer.

seo.description: Official hub for the Primetime softball organization: teams, rosters, coaching, board, fundraising, and more.
seo.keywords: Primetime softball, travel softball, fastpitch, 10U, 12U, Elite 12U
